title: Portfolio Foundation — Basic HTML Structure
description: Create the basic HTML5 document structure for your portfolio website. Include the DOCTYPE declaration, html, head, and body elements. Add a title in the head, an h1 heading with your name, and a welcome paragraph in the body.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 1: Basic HTML Structure
# Create a complete HTML5 document with doctype, html, head, title, body.
# Add an h1 with your name and a welcome paragraph.

html = """
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>My Portfolio</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Add an h1 heading with your name -->

    <!-- Add a welcome paragraph -->

</body>
</html>
"""

print(html)
test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include declaration' assert '' in html.lower() or ' tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing tag' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include a element in the head' assert '<h1>' in html.lower() and '</h1>' in html.lower(), 'Must include an <h1> heading with your name' assert '<p>' in html.lower() and '</p>' in html.lower(), 'Must include at least one <p> paragraph'
acceptance_criteria: Document has html, head, and body elements
Title element is in the head section
An h1 heading contains your name
hints:
The h1 goes inside the body:

Your Name

A paragraph is:

Welcome to my portfolio!
